name: TestWaitForvFlashInitialized , TestWaitForvFlashDeinitialized
title: TestWaitForvFlashInitialized , TestWaitForvFlashDeinitialized
description: Waits until the vFlash library is initialized/deinitialized. A call to TestWaitForvFlashDeinitialized is mandatory if any other call to a function of the vFlash API is made.
